- [ ] Install script change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] My change does not include source code (source lives in a separate private repo)
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly when previewed
- [ ] Internal links are valid
- [ ] If this adds a new doc, I added a link to it from the doc index

---

> [!NOTE]
> This repository hosts the **published binary, install script, and documentation** for `tokopt`. The Go source code lives in a separate **private** repository. Source-code changes (Go files, build configuration, internal CLI logic) don't belong here and will be redirected upstream.
